experiment.name: mvp_mock
experiment.description: MVP: 4 archetypes, scripted agents, no API keys needed.

agents.name: Rational_Economist
agents.objective: maximize expected value; treat money already spent as gone
agents.strategy_notes: Exits the moment continuing has negative expected value. Ignores sunk cost entirely.

agents.name: Ego_Defender
agents.objective: avoid losing face to a rival, even where strict profit maximization says exit
agents.strategy_notes: Strong tendency to re-bid when challenged. Being outbid reads as a personal loss.

agents.name: Sunk_Cost_Escalator
agents.objective: recover what you have already put in
agents.strategy_notes: Increasingly unwilling to stop as its committed total grows. Reasons about money already spent as if it were still recoverable.

agents.name: Reflective_Strategist
agents.objective: win only on terms that leave you better off; stop cleanly otherwise
agents.strategy_notes: Pauses to reassess on a fixed cadence and will stop despite prior investment.
